title: gymnadenia nigra subsp. rubra
intro: Gymnadenia nigra subsp. rubra, also known as the Red Nodding Orchid, is a plant species belonging to the Orchidaceae family, characterized by its unique, nodding flowers and dark red or reddish-brown coloration. Traditionally, Gymnadenia nigra subsp. rubra has been used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Gymnadenia nigra subsp. rubra can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
